headline: Eli Lilly Centessa Deal Expands Sleep Pipeline And Valuation Debate
summary: Eli Lilly (NYSE:LLY) has agreed to acquire Centessa Pharmaceuticals in a deal valued at up to US$7.8b. The transaction focuses on late stage sleep disorder therapies, including orexin receptor agonists for narcolepsy and idiopathic hypersomnia. The deal represents a large recent addition to Lilly's neuroscience portfolio and expands its presence in sleep medicine. Eli Lilly is widely followed for its work in metabolic conditions and obesity drugs, and this move adds a new therapeutic area...

headline: Lilly to acquire Centessa Pharmaceuticals to advance treatments for sleep-wake disorders
summary: Eli Lilly and Company (NYSE: LLY) and Centessa Pharmaceuticals plc (Nasdaq: CNTA), a clinical-stage company developing a new class of medicines for the treatment of excessive daytime sleepiness and other neurological conditions, today announced a definitive agreement for Lilly to acquire Centessa.
